item.title: TelkomGroup, Nongsa Digital Park, and BW Digital Strengthen Indonesia’s Digital Gateway through the NCC Submarine Cable System
item.summary: Strategic collaboration to reinforce Batam's position as a digital hub connecting Indonesia and Singapore to global markets The post TelkomGroup, Nongsa Digital Park, and BW Digital Strengthen Indonesia’s Digital Gateway through the NCC Submarine Cable System appeared first on Capacity .
